productDisplayName: Puma Men Formstripe Quarter Black Socks
description: Formstripe quarter socks in black Wear these cute socks with trainers when you're working out. puma ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception. Made of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastane Small rib at opening to grip below ankle Padded heel and toe for best comfort and Fit Sock care Machine wash in warm water Do not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
